summary: Updates the `factory:blocked` label description to explicitly state it is waiting for human intervention; unit tests assert the new description and CI/unit tests passed.

requirement_checks.requirement: Configuration description update: `LABEL_DEFINITIONS` contains the `factory:blocked` description 'Factory execution is blocked and waiting for human intervention to proceed.'
evidence: scripts/lib/factory-config.mjs: label entry for FACTORY_LABELS.blocked has description 'Factory execution is blocked and waiting for human intervention to proceed.'
git diff origin/main...HEAD shows the description replaced in scripts/lib/factory-config.mjs (commit bf61a794).

requirement_checks.requirement: Test coverage alignment: `tests/factory-config.test.mjs` asserts the updated `factory:blocked` description and test suite passes.
evidence: tests/factory-config.test.mjs: contains test 'label definitions include the blocked label metadata' asserting the new description and color.
CI workflow run id 23392255741: unit tests reported success (see run metadata provided in the review context).

requirement_checks.requirement: Limit changes to control-plane files and related tests under `scripts/**` and `tests/`
evidence: git diff origin/main...HEAD lists modified files: scripts/lib/factory-config.mjs and tests/factory-config.test.mjs (plus .factory run artifacts).
No other source files outside `scripts/` and `tests/` were modified in this change set.

findings.title: Consider adding a changelog entry
findings.details: The change clarifies operator-facing label text; a short note in CHANGELOG or release notes would improve discoverability for operators.
findings.recommendation: Add a brief line to the project's changelog or release notes mentioning the clarified wording for the `factory:blocked` label.
